title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Lido Learning

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Lido Learning
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
